basics.name: Aryan Batra
basics.summary: Software Engineer focused on strong computer science fundamentals (DSA, OS, DBMS, CN) and scalable backend systems. Experience building production microservices, AI-driven automation workflows, and early-stage engineering products.

highlights: Building a CS-focused engineering platform using Next.js, TypeScript, React.js, Supabase, and Cloudflare R2; designing structured learning systems around OS, DBMS, CN, DSA while owning full-stack architecture and product development.

Led a 5+ developer team to build and deploy a university notes platform using JavaScript, React.js, and Supabase; mentored juniors in frontend engineering (React, SolidJS, Tailwind CSS, Redux, Zustand) over 3–4 months before closing due to distribution constraints.

Architected AI automation pipelines using OpenRouter models, n8n, Cloudflare Workers, JavaScript, and Meta Graph API to generate, moderate, and publish multilingual social media content with human-in-the-loop validation.

Actively contributed to early-stage architecture of a 12-service microservices marketplace, collaborating with the Tech Lead to design relational database schemas, modular service boundaries, AWS SNS/SQS-based asynchronous communication, Firebase Authentication flows, and API Gateway integration.
Independently developed 4 core production microservices in Spring Boot with structured REST APIs, validation layers, and unit/integration testing to ensure reliable inter-service communication.

Implemented 7+ automation workflows using Activepieces integrating Shopify webhooks, vendor approvals, Razorpay payment splits, and Shiprocket logistics, ensuring fault-tolerant multi-vendor order handling; gained DevOps exposure through Docker, EC2 deployments, and Nginx configuration.

projects.name: Turbo C++ Web IDE (Browser-based DOS Emulation)
projects.description: Built a browser-based Turbo C++ IDE using DOSBox and Next.js enabling execution of legacy C programs inside modern environments with custom keyboard controller handling.

projects.name: DSA-IN-3D – Data Structure Visualizer
projects.description: Developed a 5,000+ LOC Java engine visualizing trees, graphs, sorting algorithms, and concurrency concepts with custom execution controls.

projects.name: Smart India Hackathon – Dementia Detection System
projects.description: Led development of an Android application integrated with a Python-based ML backend for early dementia detection.

projects.name: e-Yantra IIT Bombay – Self Balancing Robot
projects.description: Led design and simulation of a self-balancing robot using feedback control algorithms in Python.
